title: Bare Bones x Weskerson's 3D Items
description: Simplifies Weskerson's 3D Items for Bare Bones
body:
This pack simplifies the textures of Weskerson's 3D Items to match Bare Bones.

The goal with this pack is to make the 3D items as similar as possible to their 2D counterparts. Some textures are completely different from Weskerson's original ones because of this.

All items have been retextured, excluding spawn eggs.

---

Weskerson's 3D Items and this pack should be placed _underneath_ Bare Bones, like so:

![From bottom to top: Weskerson's 3D Items, Bare Bones x Weskerson's 3d Items, Bare Bones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6533926bc19a5fdb3cfd11d020a443c8775100cc.png)

---
